issue: Notifications fetched via socket AND polling simultaneously
description: The app maintains a real-time socket/FCM stream for notifications AND runs useQuery polling on the same data. Every socket-triggered invalidation causes a refetch on top of the live stream — 2x redundant network calls for every notification event.
recommendation: Disable polling queries when socket is connected. Let socket invalidate cache; do not poll in parallel.

issue: Three notification queries lack staleTime — refetch on every mount
description: useNotifications fires 3 separate useQuery calls with no staleTime. Any component that mounts/unmounts (sidebar open, modal close, tab switch) triggers a fresh fetch. Notifications is called in headers/sidebars that mount on every page.
recommendation: Add staleTime: 60_000 minimum to all three queries. Ideally 5 minutes for notification preferences.

issue: Business full-details refetched on every sub-route navigation within /manage
description: useMyBusiness(id) is called inside the owner Layout. Every navigation between manage sub-pages (e.g. dashboard → schedule → orders) re-runs this query because layouts re-evaluate on route change.
recommendation: Add staleTime: Infinity or at least 5 minutes. Business config rarely changes mid-session.

issue: Three queries fire unconditionally without auth/user guard
description: No enabled: !!userId or equivalent guard on any of the 3 notification queries. If a page using this hook is visited while unauthenticated or during session init, all 3 queries fire immediately and fail or return stale data.
estimated_extra_requests: 3 wasted requests per unauthenticated page load
recommendation: Add enabled: !!userId to all three useQuery calls.

issue: Data export status polled every 10 seconds
description: refetchInterval dynamically returns 10_000 when status === 'pending'. This runs while user stays on the settings page — 6 requests/minute just to check if an export finished. Should be longer since exports typically take minutes not seconds.
recommendation: Increase to 30_000 or use exponential back-off starting at 15s.

issue: Reservation dashboard polls every 60 seconds when pollingEnabled
description: Staff dashboard continuously polls all reservations every minute. If pollingEnabled is not carefully gated (e.g., it stays true on background tabs), this accumulates silently.
recommendation: Disable on visibility change (document.hidden). Consider WebSocket for live reservation updates instead.

issue: Multiple 30-60s polling intervals active simultaneously in diner mode
description: Active reservations polled every 60s + active orders polled every 30s + dynamic order status refetch. All three may run concurrently while a customer is at the table — 3+ requests/minute per diner session.
recommendation: Replace order status polling with socket subscription (station socket already exists). Reservations can poll at 120s.

issue: Active shift reminder polls every 60 seconds across all employments
description: Global clocked-in reminder polls every 60s. For users with multiple employments this multiplies. Runs as long as the user is logged into the manage area.
recommendation: Increase to 5 minutes — shift state does not change that frequently. Or drive from socket events.

description: Every mutation fires 3-5 separate invalidateQueries calls in onSuccess — orders, floors, tables, inventory items, inventory dashboard all refetch simultaneously after a single action. Over a busy lunch shift this compounds to hundreds of extra requests.
recommendation: Batch using a shared prefix key or use queryClient.invalidateQueries({ queryKey: ['orders', businessId] }) with exact: false to cover sub-keys in one call. Inventory only needs invalidation on complete/cancel, not create.

issue: useProfile called in multiple independent layouts — not deduplicated
description: User profile is fetched inside at least two different layout files. If a user navigates through routes covered by different layouts, profile refetches even if nothing changed.
recommendation: Add staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000 to useProfile. TanStack will serve cached data between route changes.

issue: Both features use discovery_search and discovery_search_infinite keys without a single shared hook
description: If a page renders both useFavorites and useDiscovery (e.g. a page showing favorite restaurants also runs discovery search), cache invalidations from favorites actions cause discovery queries to refetch and vice versa — unintended cross-hook coupling.
recommendation: Namespace the keys: ['favorites', 'discovery_search'] vs ['discovery', 'search']. Or create a single shared hook that both consume.

issue: Live reservation status polled every 30 seconds
description: Customer-facing reservation status refetches every 30s unless status is terminal. Fine for one tab, but if a customer has the reservation detail open alongside other tabs, this runs silently.
recommendation: Increase to 60s. Add visibility-based pause (pause when tab is hidden).

issue: useMyActiveShift scans all employments every 60 seconds
description: Low individual impact but every staff member logged in accumulates this. On a restaurant with 20 staff all using the dashboard simultaneously: 20 requests/minute just for shift status.
estimated_extra_requests: 1 request/min per staff member (scales with headcount)
recommendation: Increase to 3-5 minutes or drive from a shift-start/end socket event.

issue: useMyBusinesses() called in sidebar without staleTime — refetches on every page render
description: Sidebar re-renders on every route change. Without staleTime the businesses list refetches each time, even though it almost never changes during a session.
estimated_extra_requests: 1 request per navigation within manage area
recommendation: Add staleTime: Infinity — business list membership changes are rare and can be invalidated explicitly on join/leave.

issue: No global staleTime or gcTime defaults set in QueryClient
description: Without default staleTime every query refetches on every mount. This is the root cause of most missing-staleTime findings above. A single config change would fix dozens of cases at once.
recommendation: Set QueryClient defaults: staleTime: 5 * 60 * 1000, gcTime: 10 * 60 * 1000, refetchOnWindowFocus: false.

issue: refetchOnWindowFocus is true by default — triggers refetches every time user alt-tabs back
description: No global override and most queries don't set refetchOnWindowFocus: false. Every time a staff member switches browser tabs (very common in restaurant ops) all active queries refetch.
estimated_extra_requests: 1-5 extra requests per tab switch across all active queries
recommendation: Set refetchOnWindowFocus: false globally in QueryClient config. Enable it explicitly only on queries where freshness truly matters on focus (e.g. live orders).
